name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Design Partner Agreement for giving early-access partners access to a product in exchange for feedback and participation in a development program.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date this Agreement takes effect.

fields.label: Term
fields.help: Duration of the design partner engagement (e.g. '6 months', '1 year', 'through December 31, 2026').

fields.label: Product
fields.help: Description of the product or services the Partner will have early access to.

fields.label: Program
fields.help: Name and description of the design partner program, including Partner's participation and feedback obligations.

fields.label: Fees
fields.help: Fees payable by Partner to Provider, if any (e.g. '$0', '$500/month'). Leave blank or enter 'None' if no fees apply.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The U.S. state (or other jurisdiction) whose law governs this Agreement (e.g. 'Delaware').

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts where disputes will be brought (e.g. 'the state and federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware').

fields.label: Modifications to Standard Terms
fields.help: Any agreed modifications to the Standard Terms (optional).
